title: papaver rubroaurantiacum
intro: Papaver rubroaurantiacum is a species of poppy native to China, belonging to the genus Papaver and characterized by its vibrant red and orange flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sleep and relieve anxiety due to its high content of alkaloids such as protopine and berberine. The health benefits of Papaver rubroaurantiacum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
